description: Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and fucntionality. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence.UpperLeather uppers covering the forefoot and midfoot for maximum durability, breathability and styleCushioned textile lining for added comfortStitch detailing for added strengthBrand logo embossed on the midfoot strapCushioned, suede covered footed for maximum breathability, sweat-free protection and all-day comfortBuckled midfoot strap for a snug FitOutsoleTPU outsole with multi-directional grooves for maximum grip on smooth surfacesshoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
